title: Dwarf Potion
description: this datapack adds the Potion of Dwarf, and a structure where you can get the potions
body:
### Adds
- Potion of Dwarf
- Splash Potion of Dwarf
- Lingering Potion of Dwarf
- Dwarf House

the dwarf house generates in plains biomes, for those who want to get this in survival

you can also get the potions by typing this command in chat
```
/function dwarf:give_potions
```
